description:
The SeisComP database contains event data for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake (Japan, approximately M7.5, occurred 2024-01-01). Generate a formatted earthquake bulletin report for this event using SeisComP command-line tools. The report must include the earthquake's origin time, location (latitude, longitude), depth, and magnitude information. Save the final bulletin to ~/bulletins/noto_bulletin.txt.

Database connection: mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp (user: sysop, password: sysop)
SeisComP installation: /home/ga/seiscomp
